category_sources: Official SourceForge project page describes SoX as sound processing utilities for audio conversion, effects, and filters; source_facts.description says universal sound sample translator.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project page title is "SoX - Sound eXchange".
docs_sources: Official SourceForge code tree contains SoX man pages sox.1 and soxformat.7; source_facts.homepage provides the official project homepage.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page links its Code tab to https://sourceforge.net/p/sox/code/.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project page categories include Audio Conversion and Audio Editing and describes command-line sound processing; source_facts.executables lists CLI tools play, rec, sox, and soxi.
